passive.name: Spider Queen
passive.description:
Human Form: When Elise's abilities hit an enemy, she gains a dormant Spiderling.

Spider Form: Basic attacks deal bonus magic damage and restore health to Elise.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} The rank of {{ai|Spider Form / Human Form|Elise}} affects the power of ''Spider Queen''.
wiki_detail.blurb2: [[File:Elise OriginalSquare.png|'''Human Form'''|20px|link=Elise#Human Form|border]] Human Form: Whenever '''Elise's''' abilities hit an enemy, she gains a dormant ''Spiderling'', up to a cap.
wiki_detail.blurb3: [[File:Spider_Form.png|'''Spider Form'''|20px|link=Elise#Spider Form|border]] Spider Form: '''Elise's ''' basic attacks deal {{as|'''bonus ''' magic damage}} and {{tip|heal}} her.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate - Human Form:}} '''Elise''' gains one dormant ''Spiderling'' whenever she hits an enemy with an [[champion ability|ability]], storing up to {{pp|type = [[File:Elise OriginalSquare.png|20px|link=]] ''Human Form's'' Rank|2 to 5 for 4}} at a time.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Innate - Spider Form:}} '''Elise's''' [[basic attack]]s deal {{pp|type = [[File:Spider Form.png|20px|link=]] Spider Form's Rank|12 to 42 for 4|color=magic damage}} {{as|(+ 20% AP)}} {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} and {{tip|heal}} her for {{pp|type=[[File:Spider Form.png|20px|link=]] ''Spider Form's'' Rank|6 to 12 for 4}} {{as|(+ 8% AP)}} {{tip|on-hit}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Spider Form's'' effects do not apply to [[structure]]s.
* '''Elise''' will always begin the game and respawn with maximum available ''Spiderlings'' stored.
* '''Elise's''' [[File:Elise OriginalSquare.png|Human Form|20px|link=Elise#Human Form|border]] [[Elise#Spider Form / Human Form|Human Form]] ability casts can only store one ''Spiderling'' each.
* The ''Spiderlings'' have a [[Pets#Leash ranges|leash range]].
* ''Spider Form's'' basic attacks will apply other [[on-hit effect]]s and can {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}} as normal (the '''bonus''' damage does not).
** ''Spider Form's'' bonus damage and healing can be {{tip|blocked}}, {{tip|dodge}} and are not applied if '''Elise''' is {{tip|blind}}.
* Applies {{tip|proc damage}} on the bonus magic damage on-hit in ''Spider Form''.
* The ''Spiderlings'' apply {{tip|area damage}}.

Q.name: Neurotoxin / Venomous Bite
Q.description:
Human Form: Deals damage based upon how high the target's Health is.

Spider Form: Lunges at an enemy and deals damage based upon how low their Health is.
Q.tooltip: Human Form: Elise injects neurotoxin, dealing {{ basedamage }} plus {{ humanpercenthealth }} current Health magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

W.name: Volatile Spiderling / Skittering Frenzy
W.description:
Human Form: Releases a venom-gorged Spiderling that explodes when it nears a target.

Spider Form: Elise and her Spiderlings gain Attack Speed.
W.tooltip: Human Form: Elise summons an explosive spider that moves to a location and explodes when it nears an enemy or after 3 seconds. The spider deals {{ spell.elisehumanw:totaldamage }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

E.name: Cocoon / Rappel
E.description:
Human Form: Stuns the first enemy unit hit and reveals them if they are not stealthed.

Spider Form: Elise and her Spiderlings ascend into the air and then descend upon target enemy. After descending on an enemy target, Elise's bonus damage and healing from Spider Queen is increased.
E.tooltip: Human Form: Elise fires a cocoon, Stunning and revealing the first enemy hit for {{ stunduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

R.name: Spider Form
R.description: Transforms into a menacing spider, reducing her attack range in exchange for Move Speed, new abilities, and a Spiderling swarm that will attack her foes.
R.tooltip: Human Form: Elise transforms into a menacing spider, becoming melee, gaining access to Spider Form Abilities and summons all dormant Spiderlings.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}
